blockers: legacy fallback should not be used when structured issues exist

structuredIssues.title: Internal or work-log wording remains

evidence.reason: Visible wording should be external recruiter language.

structuredIssues.suggestedRepairIntent: Translate internal/work-log wording into external resume language without changing meaning.

structuredIssues.title: Trusted profile contact data is incomplete

evidence.reason: Profile/contact data must come from trusted user/profile input and must not be invented by Reviewer or Writer.

structuredIssues.suggestedRepairIntent: Collect trusted contact data from the user or profile source.

cv.summary: Power Platform and M365 automation practitioner who turns HR, legal, and operational workflows into governed low-code solutions, adoption dashboards, and supportable handoffs. Grounded experience spans Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint-backed routing, Power BI visibility, documentation, and production troubleshooting for business users.

bullets.text: Built a Power Apps and SharePoint-backed DPIA / AI impact assessment workflow with automated routing, reviewer controls, and governance-ready process visibility.
Created a self-service mentor booking workflow using form intake and SharePoint lists so HR program users could manage requests without manual spreadsheet tracking.
Supported production HR automation flows after handover, connecting Power Automate, Workday RaaS API, Dataverse, SharePoint, Jenkins, and Power BI operating signals.
Authored low-code automation and API engagement documentation covering roles, connection ownership, environment handoff, and maintainability expectations.
Stabilized recruiting sync flows by resolving data and flow defects across Power Automate, Workday RaaS API, and SharePoint handoff paths.
Built M365 Copilot usage and adoption dashboard views from audit, license, and distribution-list data to give stakeholders clearer adoption visibility.
Managed M365 Copilot trial conversion operations using usage reporting, vendor coordination, and license follow-up.

workExperience.role: Data Engineer & Tableau Dashboard Development Sales Specialist

bullets.text: Delivered dashboard and data-support work that built the analytics foundation later reused in HR and workflow visibility projects.
Coordinated technical solution support and project documentation for client delivery teams, strengthening business-to-technology handoff habits.

transferableStrengths.strength: Built and supported Power Platform workflows for legal, HR, and operations processes.
Used SharePoint-backed lists and workflow logic for approvals, booking, and recruiting sync.
Documented API/automation engagement patterns and supported knowledge transfer.
